# Knowgrph

## Source Files

- Editor Workspace Source Files for LLMs: /api/storage/llms.txt
- Editor Workspace Source Files index: /api/storage/source-files
- Source File markdown documents: /api/storage/doc/{workspaceId}/{canonicalPath}

## Access Policy

- Cloudflare AI Crawl Control Pay Per Crawl can apply at the zone boundary.
- If enabled, unpaid AI crawler requests can receive HTTP 402 with crawler-price.
- Successful paid crawler access can receive HTTP 200 with crawler-charged.
- The storage routes remain read-only and do not emulate payment headers or prices.

## App

- Knowgrph workspace: /knowgrph/
